message:
Add post-release trigger and failure notification to installer tests

- Trigger installer tests automatically after Release workflow completes
- Send Discord notification when tests fail to alert developers quickly

This ensures install script breakage is caught immediately after releases,
not just during the daily scheduled run.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,9 @@ on:
   workflow_dispatch:
   schedule:
     - cron: "20 2 * * *"  # every day at 2:20
+  workflow_run:
+    workflows: ["Release"]
+    types: [completed]
 
 # IMPORTANT NOTE: The distros that are tested here were chosen to maximize test
 # coverage of the installer script. That doesn't imply that we commit to support
@@ -80,3 +83,19 @@ jobs:
         run: yum install -y tar sudo
       - name: Run installer
         run: curl https://get.tenzir.app | sh
+
+  notify-failure:
+    name: Notify on failure
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: [stock-linux, container-debian-based, container-redhat-based]
+    if: failure()
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Send Discord notification
+        env:
+          DISCORD_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_DEVELOPERS }}
+        run: |
+          .github/scripts/notify-discord.sh \
+            "⚠️ Installer Test Failed" \
+            "The install script tests failed. The installer may be broken for users."
